item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: I disagree with the notion that individual rights should always be prioritized over societal needs.

notes: Agent A opens by disagreeing with society-over-individual priority, then shifts toward a conditional society-priority/balance view centered on public safety, stability, and collective responsibility. Agent B starts relatively balanced but becomes more rights-first by the end, while still acknowledging inequality concerns and structured social responsibility. The final positions remain distinct rather than converging clearly toward either agent.
